_doc: One ISO instant + window literals — every test that reads the wall clock
wraps its call in withClock(frozenISO, fn) and asserts derived values
against literals computed from these primitives.
· frozenISO matches the repo-wide test instant convention.
· windowMs values mirror the module's private constants exactly;
duplicating them here is intentional — the test is a contract,
not a re-derivation. If they diverge, one side is wrong.
· todayKey is the YYYY-MM-DD bucket the daily_counts table keys on;
shape is load-bearing for existing on-disk rows.
Credits: Mike Koch (napkin §7), Paul Kim (E7 ship-signal),
Elon (§5.2 finish the migration), Krystle (v171 template),
